title: Project Telos Research Wind-Down And Master Plan

claims.text: The wind-down synthesis and master plan documents exist and are linked from README.md.
claims.falsification: Either document is missing or README.md does not link both deliverables.

claims.text: The research corpus inventory records at least 150 pass ledgers, 163 packets, 445 schema artifacts, 147 Crucible run records, and 26 Gather source stores.
claims.falsification: Filesystem counts fall below the recorded inventory floor.

claims.text: Pass 0151 records the final frontier-problem source federation with 83 candidate sources, 24 Gather-verified captures, 12 problem lanes, and 8 admission gates.
claims.falsification: The pass 0151 artifact differs from those values.

claims.text: The master plan covers Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, Telos, Learn, BuildLang/buildc, and Emet as named pillars.
claims.falsification: The master plan omits one of the required named pillars.

claims.text: The wind-down deliverables preserve boundaries: they do not claim current proof of new laws of physics, clinical efficacy, or raw-scale frontier model superiority.
claims.falsification: The deliverables promote any of those fenced claims as already proven.

claims.text: The run corpus manifest records 150 pass-ledger rows through pass 0151.
claims.falsification: The manifest is missing, has a different pass-ledger row count, or does not reach pass 0151.
